title: Vanilla 3D
body:
By the name of the resource pack, you can guess that it contains blocks with 3D models. It also contains some animations that are missing in vanilla. There are few blocks in the resource pack, this is an alpha version, there may be bugs.

<details>
<summary>Update a0.3.18-05-24</summary>

New blocks: all furnaces, all pumpkins, crafting table, all buttons.

</details>
